Links

  • Alt.Lycra

    The crossroads for Spandex fetishes, stories archived here, if you want spandex reading then this is the place.

  • Zlata de

    Goddess of flexibility, fascinating how she manages to bend into those positions wearing many lycra outfits.

  • LikeRa Selfbondage Lycra & Latex

    LikeRa's naughty playground. Here I'm playing with latex, lycra, self-bondage, pantyhose, swimsuits, zentai, ropes, knots and related things.

  • Conversation Piece

    How can you top young hot girls in tight, inescapable bondage? Pantyhose of course! Like it's big brother Quality Control, you can expect imaginative bondage in a light and fun atmosphere, fine hosery & beautiful pantyhose bondage.

  • Spandexwear

    Spandexwear.com specializies in quality spandex clothing and costumes, and offers personalized, discreet service. Our garments are sweatshop free, made to order in beautiful Vermont, USA. SpandexWear is Happy Spandex!

  • Bodyhose

    Bodyhose are simply a 6' multi-functional tube garment made from very soft, seamless micro-fiber nylon-spandex, similar to tights and pantyhose.

  • Wabi-Sabi-Moe

    Japanese damsels in distress site. Costumed girls are bound and gagged. The site contains spandex, cospay, self-bondage and more fetish play.

  • Winter Fetish

    Winter Fetish has been producing fetish fashion, high quality stretchwear and bondage products since 1997

Note

These stories concern people wearing spandex clothing. They may be tied up whilst wearing spandex or enclosed in spandex during sex and are therefore adult in nature.

The stories on these pages are either a work of fiction or are based on events that may have happened to the author. These stories remain the copyright property of their respective authors.

Either the story has been sent to me to be posted on this site and therefore licensed by the author or where possible the author has been contacted to seek approval for their use, if you see your work here please let me know if you wish it removed.

The stories & images shown on this website are presented as fantasy play only.

Submit Stories

If you'd like to see your story on this site, then please send your story to me. I'd love to see your stories.
